title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 15–18, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's going on? Aren't they good?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yea! We dont want to participate in these kind of battles!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What's going on? Aren't they supposed to be strong?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why are they making those cowards fight?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What can you do to me with those claws...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you dont stop now, I'll attack you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just you? You can't kill me...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I was just pretending to be a coward

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If I didnt, then you wouldn't have left your guard down!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So he was just acting scared?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You look like you might have have a few skills!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: But you underESTI- Mated me, sham of the Nyaban Brothers

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
